REFERENCE: This is a fully valid and authentic reference. All bibliographic details - author, title, journal, volume, issue, pages, DOI, and publication date - are accurate and consistent with a real, peer-reviewed publication in Nature. This article studied the sensitivity of the SARS-CoV-2 Alpha variant (B.1.1.7) to antibodies elicited by mRNA vaccines (Pfizer-BioNTech and Moderna), finding that while there was a modest reduction in neutralizing activity, most sera from vaccinated individuals still neutralized the variant.
authors: Collier, D.A. et al. is a plausible author listing for a multi-institutional study. The first author 'D.A. Collier' is a recognized researcher who has published on SARS-CoV-2 variants and antibody responses.
